debug_info.goal:
L : Logic ℕ
φ ψ χ ξ : Formula ℕ
T : LO.Propositional.FTheory L
hT : χ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
inst✝ : Entailment.F L
hφψ : φ ⋎ ψ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
hφ : φ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
hψ : ψ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
left✝¹ : χ ➝ φ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)
hΓ₁ : ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode φ)
hΓ₂ : Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
left✝ : χ ➝ ψ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
Δ : Finset (Formula ℕ)
hΔ₁ : ↑Δ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode ψ)
hΔ₂ : Δ.conj ⋏ ψ ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
m : ℕ := max (encode φ) (encode ψ)
this✝ : ↑(Γ ∪ Δ) ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT m
this : (Γ.conj ⋏ Δ.conj) ⋏ (φ ⋎ ψ) ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
⊢ False

failed_attempts: let N := max m i
let S := Γ ∪ Δ ∪ {φ ⋎ ψ}

let Θ := Γ ∪ Δ ∪ {φ ⋎ ψ}
  obtain ⟨ρ, hρ, hmax⟩ := Θ.exists_max_image encode (by use φ ⋎ ψ
let Θ := Γ ∪ Δ ∪ {φ ⋎ ψ}

have mem_U_of_subset {s : Finset (Formula ℕ)} {k} (hs : ↑s ⊆ construction T hT k) : s.conj ∈ U := by
    induction s using Finset.induction_on with
    | empty =>
      apply mem_omega_of_mem
      apply T.mem_of_provable
      simp
    | insert a s _ ih =>
      simp at hs
      apply construction_omega_andClosed
      . use k
have hΓ_sub : ↑Γ ⊆ U := fun _ h => Set.mem_iUnion_of_mem (encode φ) (hΓ₁ h)
let β := (Γ.conj ⋏ Δ.conj) ⋏ (φ ⋎ ψ)

let S := Γ ∪ Δ ∪ {φ ⋎ ψ}
  have hS_sub : ↑S ⊆ construction_omega T hT := by
    intro x hx; simp [S] at hx
    rcases hx with hx | hx | rfl
    . exact Set.mem_iUnion_of_mem m (this (by simp [hx]))
    . exact Set.mem_iUnion_of_mem m (this (by simp [hx]))
    . exact hφψ

  have consistent : ∀ (D : Finset (Formula ℕ)), ↑D ⊆ construction_omega T hT → D.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
    intro D hD hImp
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ : ∃ N, ↑D ⊆ construction T hT N := by
       induction D using Finset.induction_on with
       | empty => exists 0; simp
       | insert a s _ ih =>
         obtain ⟨n₁, h₁⟩ := ih (by intro x hx; apply hD; simp [hx])
         have : a ∈ construction_omega T hT := hD (by simp)
         simp [construction_omega, Set.mem_iUnion] at this; obtain ⟨n₂, h₂⟩ := this
         exists (max n₁ n₂); intro x hx; simp at hx; rcases hx with rfl | hx
         . apply monotone_construction (le_max_right _ _) h₂
         . apply monotone_construction (le_max_left _ _) (h₁ hx)
    
    let P := λ k => ∀ (D : Finset (Formula ℕ)), ↑D ⊆ construction T hT k → D.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory
    have check : ∀ k, P k := by
      intro k; induction k with
      | zero =>
        intro D hD hC; dsimp [construction] at hD
        have : χ ➝ D.conj ∈ T.theory := by
          induction D using Finset.induction_on with
          | empty => simp; apply T.mem_of_provable; apply impId
          | insert d s _ ih =>
            simp; apply T.andIR;
            . apply hD; simp
            . apply ih; intro x hx; apply hD; simp [hx]
        apply hT; apply T.mem_trans this hC
      | succ k ih =>
        intro D hD hC; dsimp [construction] at hD
        split at hD
        . split_ifs at hD with hI
          . by_cases hd : decode k ∈ D
            . rename_i δ hδ
              let D' := D.erase δ
              have : ↑D' ⊆ construction T hT k := by
                 intro x hx; have := hD (Finset.mem_of_mem_erase hx)
                 simp [Set.mem_insert_iff] at this; rcases this with rfl | h;
                 . exfalso; apply Finset.not_mem_erase x D' hx
                 . exact h
              apply hI D' this
              -- Logic: D' /\ δ -> ξ equiv to D -> ξ
              apply T.imp_closed ?_ hC
              -- L |- D -> D' /\ δ
              sorry -- Standard propositional logic
            . apply ih D ?_ hC
              intro x hx

have mem_conj {S : Finset (Formula ℕ)} (h : ↑S ⊆ U) : S.conj ∈ U := by
    induction S using Finset.induction_on with
    | empty =>
      apply mem_omega_of_mem
let S := Γ ∪ Δ ∪ {φ ⋎ ψ}

have h_mem : ((Γ.conj ⋏ Δ.conj) ⋏ (φ ⋎ ψ)) ∈ U := by
    apply construction_omega_andClosed
grind
let A := (Γ.conj ⋏ Δ.conj) ⋏ (φ ⋎ ψ)

have mem_U_of_mem_T {θ} (h : θ ∈ T.theory) : θ ∈ U := by
    apply mem_omega_of_mem

have mem_conj {Λ i} (h : ↑Λ ⊆ construction T hT i) : Λ.conj ∈ U := by
    induction Λ using Finset.induction_on with
    | empty => apply construction_omega_L_subset
rename_i h_deriv

have h_subset : ↑(Γ ∪ Δ) ⊆ construction_omega T hT := by
    intro x hx
    simp at hx
    cases hx with
    | inl h => apply Set.subset_iUnion (construction T hT) (encode φ)

have h_subset_U : ∀ {S : Finset (Formula ℕ)}, ↑S ⊆ U → S.conj ∈ U := by
    intro S hS
    induction S using Finset.induction_on with
    | empty =>
      apply mem_omega_of_mem
      apply T.mem_of_provable
      simp
    | insert a s _ ih =>
      simp
      apply construction_omega_andClosed
      · apply hS
let h_imp := this

have mem_U_of_sub {Θ : Finset _} {k} (h : ↑Θ ⊆ construction T hT k) : Θ.conj ∈ U := by
    induction Θ using Finset.induction_on with
    | empty =>
      simp
simp only [construction_omega, Set.mem_iUnion] at hφψ

have hΘ_sub : ↑Θ ⊆ construction_omega T hT := by
    simp [Θ, construction_omega, Set.mem_iUnion]
let A := ((Γ.conj ⋏ Δ.conj) ⋏ (φ ⋎ ψ))

let h_deriv := this
  let Θ := insert (φ ⋎ ψ) (Γ ∪ Δ)
  have hΘ_sub : ↑Θ ⊆ U := by
    intro x hx
let A := (Γ.conj ⋏ Δ.conj) ⋏ (φ ⋎ ψ)
apply construction_omega_not_mem_csq (T := T) (hT := hT)
let Ω := (Γ.conj ⋏ Δ.conj) ⋏ (φ ⋎ ψ)

let U := construction_omega T hT
  have mem_of_subset {s : Finset (Formula ℕ)} (hs : ↑s ⊆ U) : s.conj ∈ U := by
    induction s using Finset.induction_on with
    | empty =>
      simp

let S := Γ ∪ Δ ∪ {φ ⋎ ψ}
  have hS_sub : ↑S ⊆ U := by
    intro x hx
    simp only [Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_union, Finset.mem_singleton] at hx
    rcases hx with h | h | rfl
    . exact Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨_, hΓ₁ h⟩
    . exact Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨_, hΔ₁ h⟩
    . exact hφψ

  have hS_imp : S.conj ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := by
    apply T.imp_closed (φ := ((Γ.conj ⋏ Δ.conj) ⋏ (φ ⋎ ψ)))
    . grind
    . assumption

  obtain ⟨s, hs, hmax⟩ : ∃ s ∈ S, ∀ x ∈ S, encode x ≤ encode s := 
    Finset.exists_max_image S encode ⟨_, Finset.mem_insert_self _ _⟩

  have mem_at_encode (x : Formula ℕ) (hx : x ∈ U) : x ∈ construction T hT (encode x + 1) := by
    simp [construction_omega, Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨i, hi⟩
    induction i generalizing x with
    | zero => 
      apply monotone_construction (Nat.zero_le _) hi
    | succ i ih =>
      cases le_or_gt (i + 1) (encode x + 1) with
      | inl h => exact monotone_construction h hi
      | inr h => 
        dsimp [construction] at hi
        cases h_match : decode i with
        | none => rw [h_match] at hi
